name: @kutana/openclaw-plugin
description: Kutana AI meeting tools for OpenClaw agents

tools.name: kutana_join_meeting
tools.description: Join a Kutana AI meeting by ID with optional capability declaration

capabilities.description: Agent capabilities: text_only (default), voice_in, voice_out, voice_bidirectional, tts_enabled

tts_voice_id.description: TTS voice ID override (used with tts_enabled capability)

tools.name: kutana_get_transcript
tools.description: Get recent transcript segments from the current meeting

last_n.description: Number of recent segments to return (default: 50)

tools.name: kutana_create_task
tools.description: Create a task/action item from a meeting

tools.name: kutana_get_participants
tools.description: List participants in the current meeting

tools.name: kutana_create_meeting
tools.description: Create a new Kutana AI meeting

tools.name: kutana_raise_hand
tools.description: Request to speak in the meeting

topic.description: Optional topic for what you want to discuss

tools.name: kutana_get_queue_status
tools.description: Check the current speaker queue and your position

tools.name: kutana_start_speaking
tools.description: Confirm you are starting to speak (after your turn arrives)

tools.name: kutana_mark_finished_speaking
tools.description: Signal you are done speaking, advance the queue

tools.name: kutana_speak
tools.description: Speak text in the meeting (handles turn management and TTS automatically)

tools.name: kutana_send_chat_message
tools.description: Send a chat message to the meeting

message_type.description: Message type: text, question, action_item, or decision

tools.name: kutana_get_chat_messages
tools.description: Get chat messages from the meeting

tools.name: kutana_get_meeting_status
tools.description: Get comprehensive meeting state (participants, queue, active speaker, recent chat)

tools.name: kutana_get_speaking_status
tools.description: Check if you are currently the active speaker
